data.label: B7-H3
data.description: B7-H3 (CD276) immune checkpoint protein overexpressed in NSCLC, target for ADC therapy

data.label: DS-7300
data.description: B7-H3 targeted ADC with DXd payload (topoisomerase I inhibitor) in clinical trials for NSCLC

data.label: enoblituzumab
data.description: Anti-B7-H3 humanized monoclonal antibody with enhanced ADCC activity

data.label: calicheamicin
data.description: Highly potent DNA-damaging enediyne antibiotic payload for ADCs, causes double-strand breaks

data.label: pyrrolobenzodiazepine
data.description: DNA-damaging payload class that forms interstrand cross-links, includes SG3199 and talirine

data.label: duocarmycin
data.description: DNA alkylating agent payload with high potency and bystander killing potential

data.label: cathepsin B
data.description: Lysosomal protease that cleaves valine-citrulline linkers in ADCs, highly expressed in NSCLC

data.label: valine-citrulline linker
data.description: Cleavable dipeptide linker for ADCs, cleaved by cathepsin B in tumor lysosomes

data.label: B7-H3 CAR-T
data.description: Chimeric antigen receptor T-cells targeting B7-H3/CD276 for solid tumor therapy including NSCLC

data.label: NSCLC
data.description: Non-small cell lung cancer with heterogeneous B7-H3 expression and poor prognosis

data.label: bystander effect
data.description: ADC mechanism where membrane-permeable payloads kill neighboring antigen-negative cells

data.label: MDR1
data.description: P-glycoprotein efflux pump that can confer resistance to ADC payloads

data.label: DNA repair pathways
data.description: Cellular DNA repair mechanisms that can confer resistance to DNA-damaging ADC payloads

data.label: hepatotoxicity
data.description: Dose-limiting toxicity observed with B7-H3 ADCs, particularly liver enzyme elevation

data.label: Ifinatamab deruxtecan
data.description: B7-H3-directed antibody-drug conjugate (I-DXd, DS-7300a) in clinical development for solid tumors

data.label: CD276
data.description: Alternative designation for B7-H3 protein

data.label: Tumor metastasis
data.description: Process of tumor migration, invasion, and metastases promoted by B7-H3

data.label: Immune checkpoint inhibitor
data.description: Class of immunotherapies targeting immune regulatory pathways

data.label: B7 family
data.description: Family of immune regulatory proteins including B7-H3

data.label: NJH395
data.description: First-in-class immune-stimulator antibody conjugate (ISAC) comprising a TLR7 agonist conjugated to anti-HER2 antibody via noncleavable linker

data.label: STING agonist ADC platform
data.description: Platform employing non-cyclic dinucleotide STING agonist with cleavable ester-based linker and hydrophilic PEG8-bisglucamine scaffold

data.label: Anti-HER2-TLR7 ISAC
data.description: Immune-stimulator antibody conjugate combining HER2-targeting antibody with TLR7 agonist payload for targeted immune activation in HER2+ malignancies

data.label: TAK-500
data.description: CCR2-directed antibody-drug conjugate delivering STING agonist to intratumoral myeloid cells to enhance antitumor immunity

data.label: TLR7
data.description: Toll-like receptor 7, target for immune-modulatory ADC payloads

data.label: STING
data.description: Stimulator of interferon genes, target for immune-modulatory ADC payloads

data.label: CCR2
data.description: C-C chemokine receptor 2, targeting receptor for STING agonist delivery

data.label: HER2
data.description: Human epidermal growth factor receptor 2, targeting receptor for TLR7 agonist delivery

data.label: Type I Interferon
data.description: Cytokine produced upon STING activation, driving antitumor immunity

data.label: Tumor Microenvironment
data.description: Local environment containing immunosuppressive cells targeted by immune-modulatory ADCs

data.label: Myeloid Cells
data.description: Immune cells in tumor microenvironment targeted by CCR2-directed STING agonist ADCs

data.label: TLR7/8 agonist ADC payloads
data.description: Immunomodulatory antibody-drug conjugate payloads based on TLR7/8 agonists for cancer immunotherapy

data.label: STING agonist ADC payloads
data.description: ADC payloads utilizing STING agonists for tumor-targeted immune activation

data.label: Cyclic dinucleotides
data.description: Natural STING agonists including c-di-AMP, c-di-GMP, and 2'3'cGAMP

data.label: Resiquimod derivatives
data.description: TLR7/8 agonist compounds derived from resiquimod for immunomodulation

data.label: Noncleavable linker technology
data.description: ADC linker system that does not release payload but delivers it intact

data.label: Type I interferon response
data.description: Immune signaling pathway activated by STING leading to antitumor immunity

data.label: TBK1/IRF-3 pathway
data.description: Downstream signaling pathway of STING activation

data.label: Fc gamma receptor binding
data.description: Antibody Fc region interaction affecting ADC antitumor activity

data.label: Tumor microenvironment targeting
data.description: Selective delivery of immune agonists to tumor sites

data.label: Enzymatic degradation resistance
data.description: Stability challenge for cyclic dinucleotides due to phosphodiester bonds

data.label: LIV1 targeting
data.description: Antibody targeting approach for TLR7/8 agonist delivery

data.label: Structure-based design
data.description: Rational design approach for immunomodulatory conjugates

data.label: Systemic immune activation
data.description: Unwanted systemic immune response from untargeted STING agonists

data.label: Pharmacokinetic challenges
data.description: Poor PK properties of cyclic dinucleotides due to hydrophilicity

data.label: Small molecule STING agonists
data.description: Synthetic STING activators with improved properties over natural CDNs

data.label: TLR7/8 dual agonist payloads
data.description: Novel series of TLR7/8 dual agonists with varying activity ratios designed as payloads for antibody-drug conjugates, inducing type I interferon and proinflammatory cytokines

data.label: STING agonist delivery challenges
data.description: Challenges with STING agonists include poor pharmacokinetics due to hydrophilicity and negative charge, enzymatic degradation of phosphodiester bonds in CDNs, and off-target effects causing autoimmunity and cytokine storm

data.label: STING pathway
data.description: Stimulator of interferon genes pathway that activates type-1 interferon response and pro-inflammatory cytokines

data.label: cGAS-STING pathway
data.description: Cyclic GMP-AMP synthase-STING pathway considered most focused area in current immunotherapy after CAR-T cell

data.label: 2'3'cGAMP
data.description: Natural STING agonist generated by cGAS activation through cytoplasmic DNA

data.label: c-di-AMP
data.description: Bacterial-derived cyclic dinucleotide STING agonist

data.label: c-di-GMP
data.description: Bacterial-derived cyclic dinucleotide STING agonist

data.label: TBK/IRF-3 pathway
data.description: Downstream pathway of STING activation leading to type-1 interferon response

data.label: TBK/NF-κB pathway
data.description: Downstream pathway of STING activation leading to pro-inflammatory cytokines

data.label: Type-1 interferon response
data.description: Immune response that exposes tumor antigens to T cells and NK cells

data.label: Tumor microenvironment immune activation
data.description: Process where pro-inflammatory cytokines attract immune cells to tumor microenvironment

data.label: B7-H3 internalization kinetics
data.description: Rate and efficiency of B7-H3 receptor internalization following antibody binding

data.label: mTORC1
data.description: Mechanistic target of rapamycin complex 1 that upregulates B7-H3 expression via YY2 transcription factor

data.label: B7-H3 off-target expression
data.description: Expression of B7-H3 in normal tissues that could cause ADC toxicity

data.label: YY2
data.description: Transcription factor phosphorylated by p70 S6 kinase downstream of mTORC1 to regulate B7-H3

data.label: p70 S6 kinase
data.description: Kinase that directly phosphorylates YY2 transcription factor in mTORC1 pathway

data.label: STAT3
data.description: Signaling pathway mediator involved in B7-H3-induced macrophage M2 polarization

data.label: Tumor-associated macrophages
data.description: TAMs that undergo M2 polarization in response to B7-H3 expression

data.label: Arginase 1
data.description: M2 macrophage marker upregulated by B7-H3-mediated polarization

data.label: VEGF
data.description: Vascular endothelial growth factor upregulated in B7-H3-induced M2 macrophages

data.label: CCL22
data.description: Macrophage-derived chemokine upregulated in B7-H3-mediated M2 polarization

data.label: CD38+ T cells
data.description: Cytotoxic T cell population increased upon B7-H3 inhibition

data.label: IFN-gamma
data.description: Interferon-gamma response increased with B7-H3 inhibition

data.label: MHC-II
data.description: Major histocompatibility complex II upregulated in tumor cells upon B7-H3 inhibition

data.label: PD-1 blockade resistance
data.description: Resistance to checkpoint inhibitor therapy mediated by B7-H3 expression

data.label: Ovarian cancer
data.description: Cancer type shown to be resistant to PD-1 blockade through B7-H3-mediated T-cell inhibition

data.label: TLT-2
data.description: Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells-like transcript 2 (TREML2), counter-receptor for B7-H3

data.label: CD8+ T cells
data.description: Cytotoxic T lymphocytes targeted by B7-H3-mediated immune suppression

data.label: Regulatory T cells
data.description: Tregs that work in combination with B7-H3 for tumor progression in NSCLC

data.label: PD-1 blockade therapy
data.description: Checkpoint inhibitor therapy that may be ineffective when B7-H3 mediates resistance

data.label: T-cell exhaustion
data.description: Functional impairment of T cells correlated with B7-H3 expression

data.label: YAP1
data.description: Transcription factor that regulates CD276/B7-H3 expression for immune evasion

data.label: SH3GL1
data.description: Protein that mediates B7-H3 recycling and enhances immune escape in NSCLC by promoting B7-H3 surface expression

data.label: Checkpoint inhibitor resistance
data.description: Resistance to PD-1/PD-L1 and CTLA-4 checkpoint inhibitor therapies, often associated with B7-H3 expression

data.label: T-cell suppression
data.description: Immune suppression mechanism mediated by B7-H3

data.label: MMAE
data.description: Monomethyl auristatin E - potent microtubule-disrupting cytotoxic payload used in ADCs
